contacts.message: Hi! I'm a Stanford graduate student looking for housing starting June 1st. Is this unit still available? I'd love to schedule a viewing. Best regards, Simon
Hello! I'm interested in the cottage. I'm a graduate student at Stanford starting June 1st. Could you please share more details about utilities and lease terms? Thank you!
Called and left voicemail inquiring about June 1st availability and application process
Following up on my earlier call. I'm a Stanford graduate student interested in the affordable studio. What documents do I need for the application?
